event: View of ancient Roman columns and ruins
description: A large detailed engraving depicting ancient Roman ruins with massive Doric columns in two rows forming a colonnade. The columns are tall and weathered, some still supporting architrave sections. Small human figures and scattered vegetation provide scale, showing the monumental proportions of the ancient structure. The sky shows clouds above. The engraving is rendered with meticulous cross-hatching and fine line work characteristic of Piranesi's archaeological views.

_meta.title: View of some columns of the facade opposite to that of the preceding table
